global.description: The ad features a dark background with promotional text and a logo, emphasizing a dinner offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a quick dinner deal at a special price.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: Dinner offer text

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top left, featuring the text 'QuickFork' in a modern font, likely in white or light color.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, drawing attention to the discount.
